            // Add experience button click handlers
            document.querySelectorAll('.experience-add-btn').forEach(el => {
                el.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    const envId = e.currentTarget.dataset.envId;

                    window.myop_cta_handler('addExperienceClick', { envId });
                });
            });

            // Track mouse position for locked cell tooltips
            document.querySelectorAll('.version-cell.locked').forEach(el => {
                el.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    el.style.setProperty('--mouse-x', e.clientX + 'px');
                    el.style.setProperty('--mouse-y', e.clientY + 'px');
                });
            });

            // Track mouse position for disabled experiences row tooltip
            document.querySelectorAll('.experiences-row.disabled').forEach(el => {
                el.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    el.style.setProperty('--mouse-x', e.clientX + 'px');
                    el.style.setProperty('--mouse-y', e.clientY + 'px');
                });
            });

            // Myop tooltip for truncated text (shared across all truncatable elements)
            let myopTooltip = document.getElementById('myop-tooltip');
            if (!myopTooltip) {
                myopTooltip = document.createElement('div');
                myopTooltip.id = 'myop-tooltip';
                myopTooltip.className = 'experience-tooltip';
                myopTooltip.style.display = 'none';
                document.body.appendChild(myopTooltip);
            }

            // Helper function to setup truncation tooltip
            function setupTruncationTooltip(el, fullName) {
                let tooltipTimeout = null;

                el.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
                    if (el.scrollWidth > el.clientWidth) {
                        tooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                            myopTooltip.textContent = fullName;
                            myopTooltip.style.display = 'inline-flex';

                            const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                            myopTooltip.style.left = rect.left + 'px';
                            myopTooltip.style.top = (rect.bottom + 4) + 'px';
                        }, 1000);
                    }
                });

                el.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    if (tooltipTimeout) {
                        clearTimeout(tooltipTimeout);
                        tooltipTimeout = null;
                    }
                    myopTooltip.style.display = 'none';
                });
            }

            // Tooltips for component names
            document.querySelectorAll('.component-name').forEach(el => {
                const fullName = el.dataset.fullName;
                if (fullName) {
                    setupTruncationTooltip(el, fullName);
                }
            });

            // Tooltips for version names, authors, dates, and deployed info
            document.querySelectorAll('.version-name, .version-author, .version-date, .version-deployed').forEach(el => {
                const fullName = el.dataset.fullName;
                if (fullName) {
                    setupTruncationTooltip(el, fullName);
                }
            });

            // Experience button tooltip for truncated names
            // Use a single global timeout and track the current hovered element to prevent flickering
            let experienceTooltipTimeout = null;
            let currentHoveredExperienceBtn = null;

            document.querySelectorAll('.experience-btn').forEach(el => {
                const textEl = el.querySelector('.experience-btn-text');
                if (!textEl) return;

                // Attach tooltip events to text element only, not action icons
                textEl.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
                    // Clear any existing timeout from other buttons
                    if (experienceTooltipTimeout) {
                        clearTimeout(experienceTooltipTimeout);
                        experienceTooltipTimeout = null;
                    }
                    // Hide tooltip immediately when switching buttons
                    myopTooltip.style.display = 'none';

                    currentHoveredExperienceBtn = textEl;

                    // Only show tooltip if text is truncated
                    if (textEl.scrollWidth > textEl.clientWidth) {
                        experienceTooltipTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                            // Verify we're still hovering the same element
                            if (currentHoveredExperienceBtn === textEl) {
                                const fullName = el.dataset.fullName;
                                const variant = el.dataset.variant;
                                // Show two lines: experience name and variant
                                myopTooltip.innerHTML = `<span style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;"><span style="font-weight:500;">${fullName}</span><span style="color:#71717a;">${variant}</span></span>`;
                                myopTooltip.style.display = 'inline-flex';

                                const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
                                myopTooltip.style.left = rect.left + 'px';
                                myopTooltip.style.top = (rect.bottom + 4) + 'px';
                            }
                        }, 500);
                    }
                });

                textEl.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    // Only hide if leaving the currently tracked element
                    if (currentHoveredExperienceBtn === textEl) {
                        if (experienceTooltipTimeout) {
                            clearTimeout(experienceTooltipTimeout);
                            experienceTooltipTimeout = null;
                        }
                        currentHoveredExperienceBtn = null;
                        myopTooltip.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                });
            });
        }

        function populateCompareEnvDropdown(selectId, defaultIndex) {
            const selectEl = document.getElementById(selectId);
            const dropdown = selectEl.querySelector('.compare-env-dropdown');
            const label = selectEl.querySelector('.compare-env-select-label');
            if (!environmentsState || environmentsState.length === 0) return;

            // Set default value
            const defaultEnv = environmentsState[defaultIndex] || environmentsState[0];
            selectEl.dataset.value = defaultEnv.id;
            label.textContent = defaultEnv.name;

            // Build options
            dropdown.innerHTML = environmentsState.map(function(env) {
                const selectedClass = env.id === defaultEnv.id ? ' selected' : '';
                return '<div class="compare-env-option' + selectedClass + '" data-value="' + env.id + '">' + env.name + '</div>';
            }).join('');

            // Option click handler
            dropdown.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                const option = e.target.closest('.compare-env-option');
                if (!option || option.classList.contains('disabled')) return;
                e.stopPropagation();
                const value = option.dataset.value;
                const name = option.textContent;
                selectEl.dataset.value = value;
                label.textContent = name;
                // Update selected class
                dropdown.querySelectorAll('.compare-env-option').forEach(function(o) {
                    o.classList.toggle('selected', o.dataset.value === value);
                });
                dropdown.classList.remove('open');
                selectEl.classList.remove('open');
                // Refresh disabled states in both dropdowns
                refreshCompareDisabledStates();
                attachCompareTooltipListeners();
            });

            const text = `Deploy (${count} Change${count !== 1 ? 's' : ''})`;

        function openModal(componentId, envId) {
            const component = dataState.components.find(c => c.id === componentId);
            const environment = environmentsState.find(e => e.id === envId);

            if (!component || !environment) return;

            const deploymentInfo = component.deployedVersions[envId];
            const deployedVersionId = deploymentInfo?.versionId;
            const deployedVersion = component.availableVersions.find(v => v.id === deployedVersionId);

            const queueKey = `${componentId}:${envId}`;
            const pendingVersionId = deploymentQueue[queueKey];
            const pendingVersion = component.availableVersions.find(v => v.id === pendingVersionId);

            document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent =
                `Change ${component.name} on ${environment.name}`;

            const modalPending = document.getElementById('modal-pending');
            const modalPendingText = document.getElementById('modal-pending-text');
            if (pendingVersion) {
                modalPendingText.textContent =
                    `${pendingVersion.name} (by ${pendingVersion.developer}, ${formatDate(pendingVersion.lastModified)})`;
                modalPending.classList.add('visible');
            } else {
                modalPending.classList.remove('visible');
            }

            document.getElementById('modal-current-text').textContent = deployedVersion
                ? `${deployedVersion.name} (by ${deployedVersion.developer}, ${formatDate(deployedVersion.lastModified)})`
                : 'N/A';

            const versionList = document.getElementById('version-list');
            // Use the order provided by variants_ids (already sorted correctly by the server)
            const versions = component.availableVersions || [];

            const versionToSelect = pendingVersionId || deployedVersionId;

            versionList.innerHTML = versions.map(version => {
                const isChecked = version.id === versionToSelect;
                return `
                    <label class="version-option ${isChecked ? 'selected' : ''}" data-version-id="${version.id}">
                        <input type="radio" name="version-select" value="${version.id}" ${isChecked ? 'checked' : ''}>
                        <div class="version-option-info">
                            <div class="version-option-name">${version.name}</div>
                            <div class="version-option-details">
                                Modified: ${formatDate(version.lastModified)} by ${version.developer}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </label>
                `;
            }).join('');

            let selectedVersionId = versionToSelect;
            let pendingIssueState = component.hasIssue;

            const updateApplyButton = () => {
                const applyBtn = document.getElementById('modal-apply');
                const versionChanged = selectedVersionId !== versionToSelect;
                const issueChanged = pendingIssueState !== component.hasIssue;
                applyBtn.disabled = !versionChanged && !issueChanged;
            };

            versionList.querySelectorAll('.version-option').forEach(option => {
                option.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    if (e.target.type === 'radio') return;

                    const radio = option.querySelector('input[type="radio"]');
                    radio.checked = true;
                    selectedVersionId = radio.value;

                    versionList.querySelectorAll('.version-option').forEach(opt => {
                        opt.classList.remove('selected');
                    });
                    option.classList.add('selected');

                    updateApplyButton();
                });
            });

            versionList.querySelectorAll('input[type="radio"]').forEach(radio => {
                radio.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                    selectedVersionId = e.target.value;

                    versionList.querySelectorAll('.version-option').forEach(opt => {
                        opt.classList.remove('selected');
                    });
                    radio.closest('.version-option').classList.add('selected');

                    updateApplyButton();
                });
            });

            updateApplyButton();

            // Setup issue button
            const issueBtn = document.getElementById('modal-issue');

            // Set initial state
            if (pendingIssueState) {
                issueBtn.textContent = 'Close Issue';
                issueBtn.classList.add('close');
            } else {
                issueBtn.textContent = 'Open Issue';
                issueBtn.classList.remove('close');
            }

            // Clone to remove old listeners
            const newIssueBtn = issueBtn.cloneNode(true);
            issueBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newIssueBtn, issueBtn);

            newIssueBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                pendingIssueState = !pendingIssueState;

                // Update button appearance
                if (pendingIssueState) {
                    newIssueBtn.textContent = 'Close Issue';
                    newIssueBtn.classList.add('close');
                } else {
                    newIssueBtn.textContent = 'Open Issue';
                    newIssueBtn.classList.remove('close');
                }

                // Enable apply button if issue state changed
                updateApplyButton();
            });

            // Setup apply button
            const applyBtn = document.getElementById('modal-apply');
            const newApplyBtn = applyBtn.cloneNode(true);
            applyBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newApplyBtn, applyBtn);

            newApplyBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                // Save version change
                if (selectedVersionId === deployedVersionId) {
                    delete deploymentQueue[queueKey];
                } else {
                    deploymentQueue[queueKey] = selectedVersionId;
                }

                // Save issue state change
                component.hasIssue = pendingIssueState;

                closeModal();
                renderTable();
                updateDeployButton();
            });

            document.getElementById('modal-backdrop').classList.add('visible');
            document.getElementById('modal').classList.add('visible');
        }

        function closeModal() {
            document.getElementById('modal-backdrop').classList.remove('visible');
            document.getElementById('modal').classList.remove('visible');
        }

            const availableVersions = [

        function renderExperienceVersionList(versions, selectedId) {
            const versionList = document.getElementById('experience-version-list');

            // Sort by lastModified (newest first)

                new Date(b.lastModified) - new Date(a.lastModified)
            );

            versionList.innerHTML = sortedVersions.map(version => {
                const isChecked = version.id === selectedId;
                return `
                    <label class="version-option ${isChecked ? 'selected' : ''}" data-version-id="${version.id}">
                        <input type="radio" name="experience-version-select" value="${version.id}" ${isChecked ? 'checked' : ''}>
                        <div class="version-option-info">
                            <div class="version-option-name">${version.name}</div>
                            <div class="version-option-details">

                        </div>

            versionList.querySelectorAll('.version-option').forEach(option => {
                option.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                    if (e.target.type === 'radio') return;

                    const radio = option.querySelector('input[type="radio"]');
                    radio.checked = true;
                    experienceModalState.selectedVersionId = radio.value;

                    versionList.querySelectorAll('.version-option').forEach(opt => {
                        opt.classList.remove('selected');

                    option.classList.add('selected');

            versionList.querySelectorAll('input[type="radio"]').forEach(radio => {
                radio.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
                    experienceModalState.selectedVersionId = e.target.value;

                    versionList.querySelectorAll('.version-option').forEach(opt => {
                        opt.classList.remove('selected');
                    });

        // Create custom select dropdown
        function createCustomSelect(id, options, selectedValue, onChange) {
            const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
            wrapper.className = 'custom-select-wrapper';

            const trigger = document.createElement('div');
            trigger.className = 'custom-select-trigger';

            const triggerText = document.createElement('span');
            triggerText.className = 'custom-select-trigger-text';

            const chevron = document.createElement('span');
            chevron.className = 'custom-select-chevron';

            if (selectedValue) {
                triggerText.textContent = selectedValue;
            } else {
                triggerText.textContent = 'Select variant...';
                trigger.classList.add('placeholder');
            }

            trigger.appendChild(triggerText);
            trigger.appendChild(chevron);

            const dropdown = document.createElement('div');
            dropdown.className = 'custom-select-dropdown';

            const optionsContainer = document.createElement('div');
            optionsContainer.className = 'custom-select-options';
            optionsContainer.innerHTML = options.map(option => `
                <div class="custom-select-option ${option === selectedValue ? 'selected' : ''}" data-value="${option}">
                    ${option}
                </div>
            `).join('');

            dropdown.appendChild(optionsContainer);
            wrapper.appendChild(trigger);
            wrapper.appendChild(dropdown);

            // Toggle dropdown
            trigger.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isOpen = dropdown.classList.contains('open');
                closeAllDropdowns();

                if (!isOpen) {
                    dropdown.classList.add('open');
                    trigger.classList.add('open');
                    activeDropdown = { trigger, dropdown };

                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        positionDropdown(trigger, dropdown);
                    });
                }
            });

            // Select option
            optionsContainer.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                const opt = e.target.closest('.custom-select-option');
                if (!opt) return;

                const value = opt.dataset.value;
                triggerText.textContent = value;
                trigger.classList.remove('placeholder');

                optionsContainer.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-option').forEach(o => {
                    o.classList.remove('selected');
                });
                opt.classList.add('selected');

                dropdown.classList.remove('open');
                trigger.classList.remove('open');
                activeDropdown = null;

                if (onChange) onChange(value);
            });

            return wrapper;
        }

        // Position dropdown relative to trigger using fixed positioning
        function positionDropdown(trigger, dropdown) {
            const rect = trigger.getBoundingClientRect();
            const dropdownHeight = dropdown.offsetHeight || 200;
            const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;

            const spaceBelow = viewportHeight - rect.bottom - 8;
            const spaceAbove = rect.top - 8;

            dropdown.style.width = `${rect.width}px`;
            dropdown.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;

            if (spaceBelow >= dropdownHeight || spaceBelow >= spaceAbove) {
                dropdown.style.top = `${rect.bottom + 4}px`;
                dropdown.style.bottom = 'auto';
            } else {
                dropdown.style.top = 'auto';
                dropdown.style.bottom = `${viewportHeight - rect.top + 4}px`;
            }
        }

        // Close all dropdowns
        function closeAllDropdowns() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-dropdown').forEach(d => {
                d.classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.custom-select-trigger').forEach(t => {
                t.classList.remove('open');
            });
            activeDropdown = null;
        }

        function allDeleteExperienceComponentsSelected() {
            return deleteExperienceModalState.components.every(
                comp => deleteExperienceModalState.userHasSelected[comp.id] === true
            );
        }

        function updateDeleteExperienceSaveButton() {

        function setupDeleteExperienceModalTooltip() {
            const saveBtn = document.getElementById('delete-experience-modal-save');
            const tooltip = document.getElementById('button-tooltip');

            saveBtn.addEventListener('mouseenter', (e) => {
                if (saveBtn.disabled) {
                    tooltip.textContent = 'Complete selection for all components';
                    tooltip.classList.add('show');
                    positionTooltip(e.target, tooltip);
                }
            });

            saveBtn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                tooltip.classList.remove('show');
            });

            saveBtn.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                if (saveBtn.disabled && tooltip.classList.contains('show')) {
                    positionTooltip(e.target, tooltip);
                }
            });
        }

        function positionTooltip(button, tooltip) {
            const rect = button.getBoundingClientRect();
            const tooltipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();

            tooltip.style.left = `${rect.left + (rect.width / 2) - (tooltipRect.width / 2)}px`;
            tooltip.style.top = `${rect.top - tooltipRect.height - 8}px`;
        }

        function setupDeleteExperienceModalListeners() {
            // Close dropdowns on outside click
            document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (!e.target.closest('.custom-select-wrapper')) {
                    closeAllDropdowns();
                }
            });

            // Update dropdown position on scroll
            document.getElementById('delete-experience-components-list')?.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                if (activeDropdown) {
                    positionDropdown(activeDropdown.trigger, activeDropdown.dropdown);
                }
            });

            // Update dropdown position on window resize
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                if (activeDropdown) {
                    positionDropdown(activeDropdown.trigger, activeDropdown.dropdown);
                }
            });

            // Prevent modal from closing when clicking inside modal container
            document.getElementById('delete-experience-modal-container')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
            });

            // Close modal when clicking on backdrop

        // Send event to hosting component and handle save
        function sendCancelExperienceEvent() {
            const envId = deleteExperienceModalState.envId;
            const experience = dataState.experiences?.find(e => e.id === deleteExperienceModalState.experienceId);

            const eventData = {
                action: 'cancel_experience',
                experienceId: deleteExperienceModalState.experienceId,
                envId: envId,
                componentVariants: deleteExperienceModalState.components.map(comp => ({
                    componentId: comp.id,
                    componentName: comp.name,
                    selectedVariant: deleteExperienceModalState.selectedVariants[comp.id]
                }))
            };

            window.myop_cta_handler('experienceDeleteConfirm', eventData);

            // Add selected variants to deployment queue
            deleteExperienceModalState.components.forEach(modalComp => {
                const component = dataState.components.find(c => c.id === modalComp.id);
                if (!component) return;

                // Release lock if this component was locked by this experience
                if (component.deployedVersions && component.deployedVersions[envId]) {
                    const deploymentInfo = component.deployedVersions[envId];
                    if (deploymentInfo.isLocked &&
                        deploymentInfo.lockedReason &&
                        deploymentInfo.lockedReason.toLowerCase().includes(experience?.name?.toLowerCase() || '')) {
                        deploymentInfo.isLocked = false;
                        delete deploymentInfo.lockedReason;
                    }
                }

                // Add selected variant to deployment queue
                const selectedVariantName = deleteExperienceModalState.selectedVariants[modalComp.id];
                if (selectedVariantName) {
                    const version = component.availableVersions?.find(v => v.name === selectedVariantName);
                    if (version) {
                        const queueKey = `${component.id}:${envId}`;
                        const currentVersionId = component.deployedVersions?.[envId]?.versionId;
                        // Only add to queue if different from current
                        if (version.id !== currentVersionId) {
                            deploymentQueue[queueKey] = version.id;
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            // Remove experience from environment
            if (experience) {
                experience.environments = experience.environments.filter(env => env !== deleteExperienceModalState.envId);
                if (experience.environments.length === 0) {
                    dataState.experiences = dataState.experiences.filter(e => e.id !== deleteExperienceModalState.experienceId);
                }
            }

            // Re-render the table and update deploy button
            renderTable();
            updateDeployButton();

            // Close modal after saving
            closeDeleteExperienceModal();
        }

        function handleDeploy() {
            const batch = [];
            for (const key in deploymentQueue) {
                const [componentId, environmentId] = key.split(':');
                batch.push({
                    componentId,
                    environmentId,
                    versionId: deploymentQueue[key]
                });
            }

            if (batch.length === 0) return;

            window.myop_cta_handler('deployBatch', { batch });

            batch.forEach(deployment => {
                const component = dataState.components.find(c => c.id === deployment.componentId);
                if (component) {
                    if (!component.deployedVersions) {
                        component.deployedVersions = {};
                    }
                    component.deployedVersions[deployment.environmentId] = {
                        versionId: deployment.versionId,
                        lastModified: new Date().toISOString()
                    };
                }
            });

            deploymentQueue = {};
            renderTable();
            updateDeployButton();
        }

                document.querySelectorAll('.compare-env-dropdown.open').forEach(function(d) { d.classList.remove('open'); });
                document.querySelectorAll('.compare-env-select.open').forEach(function(s) { s.classList.remove('open'); });
            });

            // Setup experience modal listeners
            setupExperienceModalListeners();

            // Setup delete experience modal listeners
            setupDeleteExperienceModalListeners();
        }

        // ==========================================
        // COMPARE MODE
        // ==========================================

        function getFooterLeft() {
            const sidebar = document.querySelector('.sidebar');
            return (sidebar && sidebar.classList.contains('collapsed')) ? '48px' : '260px';
        }

        function getEnvOrder(envId) {
            const env = environmentsState.find(e => e.id === envId);
            if (!env) return 0;
            // Use explicit order field if available
            if (typeof env.order === 'number') return env.order;
            // Infer order from environment name and id keywords
            const name = (env.name || '').toLowerCase().trim();
            const id = (env.id || '').toLowerCase().trim();
            const combined = name + ' ' + id;
            if (/\blocal\b/.test(combined))                         return 5;
            if (/\bdev(elopment)?\b/.test(combined))                return 10;
            if (/\btest(ing)?\b/.test(combined))                    return 20;
            if (/\bqa\b|\bquality|\bq\.?a\.?\b/.test(combined))    return 30;
            if (/\bstag(ing|e)?\b|\bpre-?prod/.test(combined))      return 40;
            if (/\buat\b/.test(combined))                           return 45;
            if (/\bprod(uction)?\b|\blive\b|\beprod\b/.test(combined)) return 50;
            // Fall back to array index for unrecognized names
            return environmentsState.findIndex(e => e.id === envId);
        }

        function showCompareFooter(fromEnv, toEnv) {
            const footer = document.getElementById('compare-footer');
            const footerTextEl = document.getElementById('compare-footer-text');

            // Neutral copy that works for all directions
            footerTextEl.innerHTML = `Compare version differences between environments and apply selected versions to <strong>${toEnv.name}</strong>.`;

            footer.style.left = getFooterLeft();
            footer.classList.add('visible');
        }

        window.exitCompareMode = function() {
            compareState = { active: false, fromEnvId: null, toEnvId: null };
            compareSelectedItems.clear();
            document.getElementById('compare-footer').classList.remove('visible');
            document.querySelector('table')?.classList.remove('compare-mode');
            document.querySelector('.table-container')?.classList.remove('compare-mode-active');
            document.querySelector('.content-area')?.classList.remove('compare-mode-active');
            document.querySelector('.main-layout')?.classList.remove('compare-mode-active');
            document.querySelector('.container')?.classList.remove('compare-mode-active');
            document.body.classList.remove('compare-mode-active');
            document.documentElement.classList.remove('compare-mode-active');
            renderTable();
        }

        // ==========================================
        // PUBLIC API
        // ==========================================

        window.myop_init_interface = function(config) {
            initListeners();

            if (!config || !config.environments || !config.components) {
                console.error('Invalid config structure provided to myop_init_interface.');
                return;
            }

            console.log('Component: myop_init_interface() called with:', config);

            dataState = config;
            environmentsState = config.environments;

            // Hide Compare button when only 1 environment
            const compareBtn = document.getElementById('compare-btn');
            const mobileCompareBtnInit = document.getElementById('mobile-compare-btn');
            const hideCompare = environmentsState && environmentsState.length <= 1;
            if (compareBtn) compareBtn.style.display = hideCompare ? 'none' : '';
            if (mobileCompareBtnInit) mobileCompareBtnInit.style.display = hideCompare ? 'none' : '';

            // Clear pending changes if explicitly requested (e.g., after successful deploy)
            if (config.clearPendingChanges) {
                deploymentQueue = {};
                console.log('Component: Cleared pending changes as requested');
            } else if (!deploymentQueue) {
                // Initialize deployment queue if not set
                deploymentQueue = {};
            }

            dataState.components.forEach(component => {
                component.variantCount = component.availableVersions?.length || 0;
            });

            populateEnvFilter();
            populateTagFilter();
            populateDeveloperFilter();
            renderTable();

            // Populate compare panel custom env dropdowns
            populateCompareEnvDropdown('compare-env-from', 0);
            populateCompareEnvDropdown('compare-env-to', environmentsState.length > 1 ? 1 : 0);
            refreshCompareDisabledStates();
            attachCompareTooltipListeners();
            updateDeployButton();

            // Check if we should open a modal
            if (config.openModalFor) {
                console.log('Component: Opening modal for:', config.openModalFor);
                const { componentId, envId } = config.openModalFor;

                // Open modal after a short delay to ensure table is rendered
                setTimeout(() => {
                    openModal(componentId, envId);
                }, 50);
            }
        };

        window.myop_cta_handler = function(eventData) {
            console.log('[CTA] Default handler:', eventData);
        };

        // ==========================================
        // AUTO-INITIALIZE
        // ==========================================

        function init() {
            initListeners();
            console.log('Component initialized and ready');
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
        } else {
            init();
        }

    })();
    </script>
